The '''Bak'rofsen system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was sometimes called the '''Bal'demnic system,''' as it contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bal'demnic/Legends|Bal'demnic]].

{{System-stub}}

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Star system/Legends|system]] attracted the attention of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], after [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] scouts discovered [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] on Bal'demnic. After the Confederacy was driven from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the Republic left behind a small fleet to prevent its return.

==Behind the scenes==
The Bak'rofsen system was first identified in [[Bal'demnic/Legends|Bal'demnic's]] entry in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], as part of the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. Although the entry was by [[Arthur Papadam]], it was his girlfriend that gave the system its name. It was named after [[Wikipedia:Pinky Beecroft|Pinky Beecroft]], frontman of (now defunct) Australian alternative band [[Wikipedia:Machine Gun Fellatio|Machine Gun Fellatio]].
